creator: kalakris
title: Sofle Eyelash Export
notes:
Exported from Eyelash Sofle ZMK keymap.

Features:
- Urob timerless home-row mods (hml/hmr with positional hold-tap)
- Layer-tap thumb keys (lth) for Nav, Numpad, System layers
- Esc/Grave/Tilde mod-morph
- Tmux layer (Ctrl+A + number) via hold on Z
- Vim split navigation via hold on V
- Graphite alternate layout (switchable from System layer)

Layers:
- 0: Base (QWERTY)
- 1: Graphite
- 2: Nav (navigation, function keys)
- 3: System (Bluetooth, bootloader, layer switching)
- 4: Numpad
- 5: Tmux (tab switching)
- 6: Vim (split navigation)
- 7: Mouse (trackpad click layer)
